chat.title: Navigation & Accessibility Assistant
chat.description: Ask about stadium navigation, accessible entrances, facilities, or nearby transport.
chat.placeholder: e.g., Where is the wheelchair-accessible entrance near Gate A?
chat.errorGeneric: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
chat.errorValidation: Please enter a valid message (max 500 characters).
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm your StadiumSense assistant. Ask me about stadium navigation, accessible entrances, facilities, or how to get here. I speak English, Spanish, French, and Portuguese!

crowd.title: Crowd & Operations Status
crowd.description: Real-time crowd density and operational recommendations.

transport.title: Sustainable Travel Tip
transport.description: Get eco-friendly transit suggestions and see your CO2 savings.
transport.errorGeneric: Sorry, couldn't generate a tip. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: StadiumSense uses simulated data for demonstration purposes. Not affiliated with FIFA.
footer.accessibility: Built with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance in mind.
